title: T-041 — NCR auto-creation wiring: GRN-fail / inspection-fail / CCP-deviation → NCR draft
prompt:
# T-041 — NCR auto-creation wiring (3 paths)

PRD: §12.1 inbound consumers, §11.2 V-QA-INSP-009 auto-NCR on fail, §10.2 ccp_deviation_escalation_v1, §7.1 Epic 8D

## Goal
Wire 3 NCR auto-creation paths: (A) grn.failed outbox consumer, (B) inspection-fail-on-sign Server Action side-effect, (C) CCP deviation via DSL rule. All paths reuse the single createNcrDraft Server Action (T-038) for a unified audit + outbox surface.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/src/server/quality/ncr/autoCreate.ts — central entry point per (source_kind, source_event) → createNcrDraft invocation with severity resolver + idempotency.
2. apps/web/src/server/quality/grn/outboxConsumer.ts — subscribes to grn.failed, calls autoCreate.
3. apps/web/src/server/quality/inspections/actions.ts — modify finalizeInspection to invoke autoCreate on result='fail' (instead of direct DB INSERT today in T-028).
4. apps/web/src/server/quality/ccp/deviationHandler.ts — rule action handler called by T-052 ccp_deviation_escalation_v1; resolves severity from rule severity_map.

## Files
- apps/web/src/server/quality/ncr/autoCreate.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/ncr/__tests__/autoCreate.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/grn/outboxConsumer.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/inspections/actions.ts [modify]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/ccp/deviationHandler.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
1. grn.failed consumer → 1 NCR row, outbox emits quality.ncr.created
2. Replayed grn.failed event → no duplicate NCR (idempotency)
3. Inspection fail sign → NCR via shared createNcrDraft (not direct INSERT)
4. CCP deviation (biological) → severity='critical' NCR (rule severity_map respected)

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: autoCreate.test.ts asserting all 4 AC paths with mocked outbox/DB before code
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test ncr/autoCreate'

## Risk red lines
- Always go through createNcrDraft (audit + outbox path enforcement)
- Always set idempotency key (Foundation FT-024)
- Severity is reference-table or rule driven, never hardcoded in consumer
- RLS via app.current_org_id() before any DB write (Wave0 v4.3)

pipeline_inputs.description: Wire three NCR auto-creation paths: GRN-fail outbox consumer, inspection-fail-on-sign Server Action side-effect, CCP-deviation auto-create via ccp_deviation_escalation_v1 rule.
pipeline_inputs.details: Three wiring paths, each with an E2E integration test: (A) grn.failed event consumer (publisher in 05-WH): when consumed, creates ncr_reports draft with type='supplier', severity computed from fail_reason_code, reference_type='grn', reference_id=grn_id. (B) Inspection sign with result='fail' (T-028 already auto-drafts; this task ensures the auto-draft is wired through createNcrDraft Server Action — not a direct DB INSERT — and emits quality.ncr.created event). (C) CCP deviation via ccp_deviation_escalation_v1 DSL rule (T-052) — the rule action 'auto_create_ncr' resolves to a createNcrDraft Server Action invocation with reference_type='ccp_deviation', reference_id=ccp_monitoring_record_id, severity per the rule's severity_map. All three paths share the same Server Action surface (T-038 createNcrDraft) so a single audit + outbox path is enforced. Idempotency: same source-event ID always resolves to same NCR (e.g., grn_id+timestamp → idempotency key). PRD anchors: §12.1 P1 inbound consumers table (grn.received first entry); §11.2 V-QA-INSP-009 (auto-NCR on fail); §10.2 ccp_deviation_escalation_v1 rule definition; §7.1 Epic 8D 09-d-02.
out_of_scope: Do not implement CCP rule registration here (T-052)
Do not implement GRN producer side (owned by 05-WH)
Do not modify NCR core Server Actions (T-038 owns)
acceptance_criteria: Given a grn.failed outbox event with grn_id=G1, when the consumer processes it, then exactly 1 ncr_reports row exists with reference_type='grn', reference_id=G1, status='draft', and quality.ncr.created event is emitted with the GRN idempotency key
Given an existing draft NCR for grn_id=G1, when the same grn.failed event is replayed (idempotency test), then no second ncr_reports row is created and outbox shows 1 event total

Given an inspection sign with result='fail' (T-028 path), when the Server Action settles, then a draft NCR is created via the shared createNcrDraft (not direct DB INSERT) with reference_type='inspection', reference_id=inspection.id, fail_reason_code_id inherited

Given a CCP monitoring record insert where within_limits=false AND ccp.hazard_type='biological', when the ccp_deviation_escalation_v1 rule fires (T-052), then deviationHandler invokes createNcrDraft with severity='critical' (per rule severity_map) and reference_type='ccp_deviation'
test_strategy: RED: apps/web/src/server/quality/ncr/__tests__/autoCreate.test.ts asserting all 4 paths with mocked outbox + DB before code; integration-style test stubs the upstream events
risk_red_lines: Do not bypass createNcrDraft Server Action — direct DB INSERTs violate the audit/outbox path (translation-notes-quality §M-05 / §M-06)
Do not skip idempotency keys (replayed GRN event must not duplicate NCRs — Foundation FT-024)
Do not couple severity computation to the consumer — severity flows from rule severity_map (CCP) or fail_reason_code (GRN/inspection) which are themselves reference-table driven
Do not consume events outside tenant context — RLS via app.current_org_id() must be set before any DB write (Wave0 v4.3)
